name: Visa Infinite Private
description: Visa Infinite Private: A Card Beyond Limits – Crafted for Private Experience
full_text:
Visa Infinite Private


--- Benefits ---

Visa Infinite Private: A Card Beyond Limits – Crafted for Private Experience

It’s not just a card it’s a statement of prestige. Designed exclusively for Banque Misr Private Segment, with this card, every experience is effortless, every journey is first-class, and every privilege is designed just for you.


--- World Awaits – Travel Redefined ---

Airlines:

Destinations - all departing CAI:

Luxury at Every Terminal Where your airport experience is as premium as your destination:

Earn 3.5 points per each EGP 1 spent locally and internationally.

Email : concierge@visainfinite-mea.com For English : +44 7874 023129 For French : +44 7520 631646 For Arabic : +44 7520 631645

Email

concierge@visainfinite-mea.com

For English

For French

For Arabic

Why Choose Banque Misr Visa Infinite Private ?

Private

• Business Class Flight: One complimentary business-class ticket to any of mentioned below destinations during the first year of card issuance (Worth up to USD 1,000). Starting from second year, a minimum annual card spending of EGP 4 million is required to be eligible for the complimentary ticket again
• Premium Airport Transfers in Cairo: Two luxury car transfers per year from/to Cairo airport.
• Meet & Assist (Cairo): Two Meet and Greet airport services per year at Cairo International Airport.
• Meet & Assist (Dubai): Two Meet & Greet airport services per year in Dubai Airport.
• Premium Airport Transfers in Dubai: Two luxury car transfers per year from/to Dubai airport.
• Egypt Air
• Emirates Airlines
• Saudi Airlines
• British Airways
• Air France
• Turkish Airlines
• Dubai
• Jeddah
• Riyadh
• London
• Paris
• Istanbul
• Unlimited Lounge Access: Enjoy access to over 1,300 airport lounges worldwide with Visa Airport Companion App. Eligibility requires making an international transaction of at least USD 5 (or equivalent in EGP) via POS or ecommerce within 90 days prior to travel.
• VIP Meet & Assist : Up to 25% off fast-track airport services with YQ Meet & Assist in 450+ destinations.
• Airport Dining Discounts : Exclusive savings at global airport restaurants via Visa Dine & Travel. Stay. Drive. Shop. In Style : Indulge in the finest with privileges tailored just for you:
• Complimentary Hotel Stays : Enjoy luxurious nights at 4- and 5-star hotels worldwide with exclusive perks like $100 credit and free breakfast.
• 12% Off on Agoda: Elevate your stay with premium discounts
• 10% Off Car Rentals via Rental.com: Travel in style with Visa Infinite savings.
• 15% Off with SIXT Platinum: Exclusive discounts on worldwide car rentals + 10% off transfers and limos.
• Exclusive Shopping at Bicester Village : Unlock elite discounts at Europe’s premier shopping destination.
• Gourmet Dining: Exclusive access to fine dining experiences worldwide.
• Up to 50% Off Global Attraction: VIP access to concerts, entertainment, and cultural experiences via BookingBash.
• Exclusive Golf Privileges: Special green fee discounts at prestigious golf courses worldwide. Comfort and Protection at Your Fingertips Luxury is not just about indulgence—it’s about feeling secure:
• Event Ticket Cancellation Protection: Refunds for tickets in case of an emergency preventing your attendance.
• Protection Against Fraudulent Use: Your purchases are secured with the highest level of protection.
• Purchase Protection: Coverage against theft, damage, or non-delivery.
• Extended Warranty: Extend the warranty period on eligible purchases for up to a year. With Visa Infinite Concierge, the world bends to your requests:
• 24/7 VIP Concierge & WhatsApp Concierge: Instant support for travel, shopping, and lifestyle needs.
• Exclusive Event Access: Priority booking for sports, concerts, and global events.
• Personal Shopping & Gift Services: Let our concierge source the rarest luxury items for you
• Ease and convenience: Manage your credit card anytime and anywhere through the BM Online mobile banking application
• SMS Service: Enjoy SMS notifications immediately after every transaction you make with your credit card
• Installment flexibility: Manage your budget, purchases and cash withdrawals over periods of up to 36 months at competitive interest rates.


--- Installment flexibility ---

• Fast and secure shopping: Use contactless payment technology for faster and safer shopping.
• International usage: Enjoy the freedom to use your credit card anywhere in the world upon issuance.
• Interest-Free Installments: Take advantage of interest-free installment offers at many merchants contracted with us for up to 60 months.


--- Interest-Free Installments ---

Visa Infinite Private – Because Ordinary is Not an Option.

*Disclaimer: Fees may apply if the minimum balance threshold is not maintained.

For more info about Usage limits and Fees Details Press Here
